title: Dysmenorrhea and Infertility - Endometriosis
chief_complaint: 30-year-old with severe dysmenorrhea (pain with periods) since age 16, deep dyspareunia, and 2-year history of infertility. Pain progressively worsening. Cyclic rectal pain during menses.

physical_exam.pelvic: Tender nodularity uterosacral ligaments, fixed retroverted uterus, tender adnexa bilaterally

hidden_data.us_pelvis: Bilateral endometriomas (chocolate cysts) 4cm right, 3cm left, obliterated cul-de-sac
hidden_data.laparoscopy: Multiple endometriotic implants on peritoneum, ovaries, and uterosacral ligaments, stage IV

patient_responses.pain: Pain with periods since I was a teenager, getting worse
patient_responses.pregnancy: We've been trying for 2 years, no success

feedback.incorrect_message: This is endometriosis. The symptoms + endometriomas confirm it.
feedback.attending_note: Endometriosis: NSAIDs + OCPs for pain. Laparoscopic excision of lesions and endometriomas. GnRH agonists for 3-6 months post-op. IVF for infertility. Multidisciplinary pain management.
